layman_headline: Ethereum shows signs of a bounce from fear-driven lows as bullish candle pattern emerges.
layman_explanation: The crypto market has been in a fearful state recently, but sentiment is improving from extreme fear toward just regular fear. Ethereum dropped significantly over recent weeks but has surged nearly 20% in just the past 5 days and is forming a strong bullish candle pattern called 'Three White Soldiers' — three consecutive strong up-days. It's sitting right above a key support level at $1,900 with a clear path toward $2,000, offering a favorable risk-to-reward ratio of nearly 3:1.
layman_action: Consider a small position in Ethereum near the $1,900 support level with a stop-loss at $1,830. Take profits around $2,000. This is a moderate-confidence trade — don't oversize it.
expert_reasoning: ETH presents the strongest risk-adjusted setup among candidates. The Three White Soldiers pattern on the chart is a reliable bullish reversal signal, and the 5-day momentum of +19.7% confirms buyers are stepping in aggressively. RSI at 44 is neutral — not overbought, leaving room for upside. Support at $1,900 is very close (-1.4%), giving a tight stop, while resistance at $2,000 provides a 2.84x risk/reward ratio. The Fear & Greed index improving from 25 to 33 suggests the worst of the selling pressure may be easing. High BTC dominance at 56.8% is a headwind for alts, which tempers confidence, but ETH's massive liquidity ($10.8B daily volume) and ecosystem TVL of $42B make it the safest alt to play in this environment.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.8% continues to suppress altcoin performance — ETH could underperform even if BTC rallies
Bitcoin faces key resistance at $68,000 per analysts; rejection there could drag ETH back below $1,900 support
The CLARITY Act political uncertainty and broader regulatory noise could create sudden negative sentiment shifts
watch_list: BTC price action at the $68,000 resistance level — a rejection could pull ETH down with it
Fear & Greed index trend — continued improvement above 35 would confirm risk-on sentiment returning
ETH holding $1,900 support over the next 48 hours — a close below invalidates the bullish setup
market_context: The crypto market is in a 'Fear' state (33/100) but improving from 'Extreme Fear' last week (25). BTC is stable near $65,800 with high dominance at 56.8%, creating a challenging but not impossible environment for selective alt plays.
context_banner: Fear is receding and ETH's Three White Soldiers pattern near $1,900 support offers a disciplined swing entry with defined risk.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed improving from 25 to 33 with upward trend, suggesting worst of the sell-off sentiment is fading — historically a reliable signal (67% win rate).
ETH RSI at 44 is neutral with room to run higher, not yet overbought — RSI has been our most reliable signal source at 83% win rate.
Three White Soldiers bullish candlestick pattern on ETH indicates sustained buying pressure and trend acceleration, confirmed by +19.7% 5-day momentum.
ETH derivatives have reset per Blockworks analysis, clearing overleveraged positions and setting up a cleaner base for the next leg up.
Bitcoin holding near $66,300 with macro tailwinds (chip rally, yen weakness) provides a stable backdrop for ETH to push toward $2,000 resistance.
